sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96237" key="sta/luc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στάλυξ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σταλαγμός</foreign>, prob. l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στάληξ</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl>:—hence <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεοστάλυξ</foreign>, and perh. (through <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σταλύζω</foreign>, which is not found) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσταλύζω, ἀνασταλύζω</foreign>.</entryFree>
